type=SQL_SCALAR_FUNCTION  	CREATE FUNCTION dbo.fn_diagramobjects()  	RETURNS int 	WITH EXECUTE AS N'dbo' 	AS 	BEGIN 		declare @id_upgraddiagrams		int 		declare @id_sysdiagrams			int 		declare @id_helpdiagrams		int 		declare @id_helpdiagramdefinition	int 		declare @id_creatediagram	int 		declare @id_renamediagram	int 		declare @id_alterdiagram 	int  		declare @id_dropdiagram		int 		declare @InstalledObjects	int  		select @InstalledObjects = 0  		select 	@id_upgraddiagrams = object_id(N'dbo.sp_upgraddiagrams'), 			@id_sysdiagrams = object_id(N'dbo.sysdiagrams'), 			@id_helpdiagrams = object_id(N'dbo.sp_helpdiagrams'), 			@id_helpdiagramdefinition = object_id(N'dbo.sp_helpdiagramdefinition'), 			@id_creatediagram = object_id(N'dbo.sp_creatediagram'), 			@id_renamediagram = object_id(N'dbo.sp_renamediagram'), 			@id_alterdiagram = object_id(N'dbo.sp_alterdiagram'),  			@id_dropdiagram = object_id(N'dbo.sp_dropdiagram')  		if @id_upgraddiagrams is not null 			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 1 		if @id_sysdiagrams is not null 			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 2 		if @id_helpdiagrams is not null 			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 4 		if @id_helpdiagramdefinition is not null 			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 8 		if @id_creatediagram is not null 			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 16 		if @id_renamediagram is not null 			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 32 		if @id_alterdiagram  is not null 			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 64 		if @id_dropdiagram is not null 			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 128 		 		return @InstalledObjects  	END

type=SQL_SCALAR_FUNCTION  CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[WF_IsAdmin](@UserKey nvarchar(200)) RETURNS bit AS BEGIN     DECLARE @uFull  nvarchar(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@UserKey,'')));     DECLARE @uShort nvarchar(200) = dbo.WF_UserKeyShort(@uFull);      IF NULLIF(@uFull,'') IS NULL         RETURN 0;      -- ADMIN = admin global (VerTodo NO define admin)     IF EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM dbo.WF_UserPermiso p         WHERE p.Activo = 1           AND p.PermisoKey = 'ADMIN'           AND p.UserKey IN (@uFull, @uShort)     ) RETURN 1;      RETURN 0; END

type=SQL_SCALAR_FUNCTION  -- ====== Permiso por usuario/rol (scope/proceso opcional) ====== CREATE   FUNCTION [dbo].[WF_UserHasPermiso] (     @UserKey    nvarchar(200),     @PermisoKey nvarchar(50),     @ProcesoKey nvarchar(50) = NULL,     @ScopeKey   nvarchar(50) = NULL ) RETURNS bit AS BEGIN     DECLARE @uFull nvarchar(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@UserKey,'')));     DECLARE @uShort nvarchar(200) = dbo.WF_UserKeyShort(@uFull);      -- Admin pisa todo     IF dbo.WF_IsAdmin(@uFull) = 1 RETURN 1;      -- Permisos directos por usuario     IF EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM dbo.WF_UserPermiso p         WHERE p.Activo=1           AND p.PermisoKey=@PermisoKey           AND p.UserKey IN (@uFull, @uShort)           AND (                 p.VerTodo=1              OR (                     (p.ProcesoKey IS NULL OR p.ProcesoKey=@ProcesoKey)                 AND (p.ScopeKey   IS NULL OR p.ScopeKey=@ScopeKey)                 )           )     ) RETURN 1;      -- Permisos por rol (WF_UsuarioRol)     IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.WF_UsuarioRol','U') IS NOT NULL     BEGIN         IF EXISTS (             SELECT 1             FROM dbo.WF_UsuarioRol ur             JOIN dbo.WF_RolPermiso rp ON rp.RolKey = ur.RolKey AND rp.Activo=1             WHERE ur.Usuario IN (@uFull, @uShort)               AND rp.PermisoKey=@PermisoKey               AND (                     rp.VerTodo=1                  OR (                         (rp.ProcesoKey IS NULL OR rp.ProcesoKey=@ProcesoKey)                     AND (rp.ScopeKey   IS NULL OR rp.ScopeKey=@ScopeKey)                     )               )         ) RETURN 1;     END      RETURN 0; END

type=SQL_SCALAR_FUNCTION  -- ====== Normalizar userKey (OMARD\USUARIO => USUARIO) ====== CREATE   FUNCTION dbo.WF_UserKeyShort(@UserKey nvarchar(200)) RETURNS nvarchar(200) AS BEGIN     DECLARE @u nvarchar(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@UserKey,'')));     IF CHARINDEX('\', @u) > 0         SET @u = RIGHT(@u, LEN(@u) - CHARINDEX('\', @u));     RETURN @u; END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  	CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_alterdiagram 	( 		@diagramname 	sysname, 		@owner_id	int	= null, 		@version 	int, 		@definition 	varbinary(max) 	) 	WITH EXECUTE AS 'dbo' 	AS 	BEGIN 		set nocount on 	 		declare @theId 			int 		declare @retval 		int 		declare @IsDbo 			int 		 		declare @UIDFound 		int 		declare @DiagId			int 		declare @ShouldChangeUID	int 	 		if(@diagramname is null) 		begin 			RAISERROR ('Invalid ARG', 16, 1) 			return -1 		end 	 		execute as caller; 		select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID();	  		select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');  		if(@owner_id is null) 			select @owner_id = @theId; 		revert; 	 		select @ShouldChangeUID = 0 		select @DiagId = diagram_id, @UIDFound = principal_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @diagramname  		 		if(@DiagId IS NULL or (@IsDbo = 0 and @theId <> @UIDFound)) 		begin 			RAISERROR ('Diagram does not exist or you do not have permission.', 16, 1); 			return -3 		end 	 		if(@IsDbo <> 0) 		begin 			if(@UIDFound is null or USER_NAME(@UIDFound) is null) -- invalid principal_id 			begin 				select @ShouldChangeUID = 1 ; 			end 		end  		-- update dds data			 		update dbo.sysdiagrams set definition = @definition where diagram_id = @DiagId ;  		-- change owner 		if(@ShouldChangeUID = 1) 			update dbo.sysdiagrams set principal_id = @theId where diagram_id = @DiagId ;  		-- update dds version 		if(@version is not null) 			update dbo.sysdiagrams set version = @version where diagram_id = @DiagId ;  		return 0 	END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  	CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_creatediagram 	( 		@diagramname 	sysname, 		@owner_id		int	= null, 	 		@version 		int, 		@definition 	varbinary(max) 	) 	WITH EXECUTE AS 'dbo' 	AS 	BEGIN 		set nocount on 	 		declare @theId int 		declare @retval int 		declare @IsDbo	int 		declare @userName sysname 		if(@version is null or @diagramname is null) 		begin 			RAISERROR (N'E_INVALIDARG', 16, 1); 			return -1 		end 	 		execute as caller; 		select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID();  		select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner'); 		revert;  		 		if @owner_id is null 		begin 			select @owner_id = @theId; 		end 		else 		begin 			if @theId <> @owner_id 			begin 				if @IsDbo = 0 				begin 					RAISERROR (N'E_INVALIDARG', 16, 1); 					return -1 				end 				select @theId = @owner_id 			end 		end 		-- next 2 line only for test, will be removed after define name unique 		if EXISTS(select diagram_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @theId and name = @diagramname) 		begin 			RAISERROR ('The name is already used.', 16, 1); 			return -2 		end 	 		insert into dbo.sysdiagrams(name, principal_id , version, definition) 				VALUES(@diagramname, @theId, @version, @definition) ; 		 		select @retval = @@IDENTITY  		return @retval 	END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  	CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_dropdiagram 	( 		@diagramname 	sysname, 		@owner_id	int	= null 	) 	WITH EXECUTE AS 'dbo' 	AS 	BEGIN 		set nocount on 		declare @theId 			int 		declare @IsDbo 			int 		 		declare @UIDFound 		int 		declare @DiagId			int 	 		if(@diagramname is null) 		begin 			RAISERROR ('Invalid value', 16, 1); 			return -1 		end 	 		EXECUTE AS CALLER; 		select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID(); 		select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');  		if(@owner_id is null) 			select @owner_id = @theId; 		REVERT;  		 		select @DiagId = diagram_id, @UIDFound = principal_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @diagramname  		if(@DiagId IS NULL or (@IsDbo = 0 and @UIDFound <> @theId)) 		begin 			RAISERROR ('Diagram does not exist or you do not have permission.', 16, 1) 			return -3 		end 	 		delete from dbo.sysdiagrams where diagram_id = @DiagId; 	 		return 0; 	END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  	CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_helpdiagramdefinition 	( 		@diagramname 	sysname, 		@owner_id	int	= null 		 	) 	WITH EXECUTE AS N'dbo' 	AS 	BEGIN 		set nocount on  		declare @theId 		int 		declare @IsDbo 		int 		declare @DiagId		int 		declare @UIDFound	int 	 		if(@diagramname is null) 		begin 			RAISERROR (N'E_INVALIDARG', 16, 1); 			return -1 		end 	 		execute as caller; 		select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID(); 		select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner'); 		if(@owner_id is null) 			select @owner_id = @theId; 		revert;  	 		select @DiagId = diagram_id, @UIDFound = principal_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @diagramname; 		if(@DiagId IS NULL or (@IsDbo = 0 and @UIDFound <> @theId )) 		begin 			RAISERROR ('Diagram does not exist or you do not have permission.', 16, 1); 			return -3 		end  		select version, definition FROM dbo.sysdiagrams where diagram_id = @DiagId ;  		return 0 	END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  	CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_helpdiagrams 	( 		@diagramname sysname = NULL, 		@owner_id int = NULL 	) 	WITH EXECUTE AS N'dbo' 	AS 	BEGIN 		DECLARE @user sysname 		DECLARE @dboLogin bit 		EXECUTE AS CALLER; 			SET @user = USER_NAME(); 			SET @dboLogin = CONVERT(bit,IS_MEMBER('db_owner')); 		REVERT; 		SELECT 			[Database] = DB_NAME(), 			[Name] = name, 			[ID] = diagram_id, 			[Owner] = USER_NAME(principal_id), 			[OwnerID] = principal_id 		FROM 			sysdiagrams 		WHERE 			(@dboLogin = 1 OR USER_NAME(principal_id) = @user) AND 			(@diagramname IS NULL OR name = @diagramname) AND 			(@owner_id IS NULL OR principal_id = @owner_id) 		ORDER BY 			4, 5, 1 	END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  	CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_renamediagram 	( 		@diagramname 		sysname, 		@owner_id		int	= null, 		@new_diagramname	sysname 	 	) 	WITH EXECUTE AS 'dbo' 	AS 	BEGIN 		set nocount on 		declare @theId 			int 		declare @IsDbo 			int 		 		declare @UIDFound 		int 		declare @DiagId			int 		declare @DiagIdTarg		int 		declare @u_name			sysname 		if((@diagramname is null) or (@new_diagramname is null)) 		begin 			RAISERROR ('Invalid value', 16, 1); 			return -1 		end 	 		EXECUTE AS CALLER; 		select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID(); 		select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');  		if(@owner_id is null) 			select @owner_id = @theId; 		REVERT; 	 		select @u_name = USER_NAME(@owner_id) 	 		select @DiagId = diagram_id, @UIDFound = principal_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @diagramname  		if(@DiagId IS NULL or (@IsDbo = 0 and @UIDFound <> @theId)) 		begin 			RAISERROR ('Diagram does not exist or you do not have permission.', 16, 1) 			return -3 		end 	 		-- if((@u_name is not null) and (@new_diagramname = @diagramname))	-- nothing will change 		--	return 0; 	 		if(@u_name is null) 			select @DiagIdTarg = diagram_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @theId and name = @new_diagramname 		else 			select @DiagIdTarg = diagram_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @new_diagramname 	 		if((@DiagIdTarg is not null) and  @DiagId <> @DiagIdTarg) 		begin 			RAISERROR ('The name is already used.', 16, 1); 			return -2 		end		 	 		if(@u_name is null) 			update dbo.sysdiagrams set [name] = @new_diagramname, principal_id = @theId where diagram_id = @DiagId 		else 			update dbo.sysdiagrams set [name] = @new_diagramname where diagram_id = @DiagId 		return 0 	END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  	CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_upgraddiagrams 	AS 	BEGIN 		IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.sysdiagrams') IS NOT NULL 			return 0; 	 		CREATE TABLE dbo.sysdiagrams 		( 			name sysname NOT NULL, 			principal_id int NOT NULL,	-- we may change it to varbinary(85) 			diagram_id int PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY, 			version int, 	 			definition varbinary(max) 			CONSTRAINT UK_principal_name UNIQUE 			( 				principal_id, 				name 			) 		);   		/* Add this if we need to have some form of extended properties for diagrams */ 		/* 		IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.sysdiagram_properties') IS NULL 		BEGIN 			CREATE TABLE dbo.sysdiagram_properties 			( 				diagram_id int, 				name sysname, 				value varbinary(max) NOT NULL 			) 		END 		*/  		IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.dtproperties') IS NOT NULL 		begin 			insert into dbo.sysdiagrams 			( 				[name], 				[principal_id], 				[version], 				[definition] 			) 			select	  				convert(sysname, dgnm.[uvalue]), 				DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID(N'dbo'),			-- will change to the sid of sa 				0,							-- zero for old format, dgdef.[version], 				dgdef.[lvalue] 			from dbo.[dtproperties] dgnm 				inner join dbo.[dtproperties] dggd on dggd.[property] = 'DtgSchemaGUID' and dggd.[objectid] = dgnm.[objectid]	 				inner join dbo.[dtproperties] dgdef on dgdef.[property] = 'DtgSchemaDATA' and dgdef.[objectid] = dgnm.[objectid] 				 			where dgnm.[property] = 'DtgSchemaNAME' and dggd.[uvalue] like N'_EA3E6268-D998-11CE-9454-00AA00A3F36E_'  			return 2; 		end 		return 1; 	END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Escalamiento_ConsumirYAplicar]     @Take int = 20 AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      DECLARE @Ahora datetime = GETDATE();      -- 1) Claim atómico (evita doble consumo)     DECLARE @msgs TABLE (         Id bigint NOT NULL,         Payload nvarchar(max) NULL     );      ;WITH cte AS (         SELECT TOP (@Take)             q.Id,             q.Payload         FROM dbo.WF_Queue q WITH (ROWLOCK, READPAST, UPDLOCK)         WHERE q.Queue = 'wf.escalamiento'           AND q.Processed = 0           AND (q.DueAt IS NULL OR q.DueAt <= @Ahora)         ORDER BY q.Priority DESC, q.CreatedAt, q.Id     )     UPDATE q         SET Processed   = 1,             ProcessedAt = @Ahora,             Attempts    = Attempts + 1,             LastError   = NULL     OUTPUT inserted.Id, inserted.Payload     INTO @msgs(Id, Payload)     FROM dbo.WF_Queue q     JOIN cte ON cte.Id = q.Id;      IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM @msgs)         RETURN;      -- 2) Payload inválido → marcar error (sin reintentar infinito)     ;WITH bad AS (         SELECT m.Id         FROM @msgs m         WHERE m.Payload IS NULL OR ISJSON(m.Payload) <> 1     )     UPDATE q         SET LastError = 'Payload inválido (no JSON)'     FROM dbo.WF_Queue q     JOIN bad b ON b.Id = q.Id;      -- 3) Aplicar escalamiento (solo payload válido)     ;WITH src AS (         SELECT             m.Id AS MsgId,             TRY_CONVERT(bigint, JSON_VALUE(m.Payload, '$.tareaId')) AS TareaId         FROM @msgs m         WHERE m.Payload IS NOT NULL AND ISJSON(m.Payload) = 1     ),     pend AS (         SELECT             s.MsgId,             t.Id AS TareaId,             i.ProcesoKey,             t.RolDestino AS RolActual,             t.FechaVencimiento         FROM src s         JOIN dbo.WF_Tarea t ON t.Id = s.TareaId         JOIN dbo.WF_Instancia i ON i.Id = t.WF_InstanciaId         WHERE s.TareaId IS NOT NULL           AND t.Estado = 'Pendiente'     ),     regla AS (         SELECT             p.MsgId,             p.TareaId,             p.ProcesoKey,             p.RolActual,             p.FechaVencimiento,             r.RolDestino AS NuevoRol,             r.MinutosVencida         FROM pend p         OUTER APPLY (             SELECT TOP 1 r.*             FROM dbo.WF_EscalamientoRegla r             WHERE r.Activo = 1               AND r.ProcesoKey = p.ProcesoKey               AND r.RolOrigen  = p.RolActual               AND p.FechaVencimiento IS NOT NULL               AND r.MinutosVencida <= DATEDIFF(minute, p.FechaVencimiento, @Ahora)             ORDER BY r.MinutosVencida DESC         ) r     )     UPDATE t         SET RolDestino = r.NuevoRol,             Datos = JSON_MODIFY(                         JSON_MODIFY(                             JSON_MODIFY(ISNULL(t.Datos,'{}'), '$.escaladoRol', r.NuevoRol),                             '$.escaladoDesdeRol', r.RolActual                         ),                         '$.escaladoEn', CONVERT(varchar(19), @Ahora, 126)                    )     FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t     JOIN regla r ON r.TareaId = t.Id     WHERE r.NuevoRol IS NOT NULL       AND r.NuevoRol <> r.RolActual;      -- 4) Si tareaId era NULL o no estaba pendiente, dejar marca (para diagnóstico)     UPDATE q         SET LastError = ISNULL(q.LastError, 'No se aplicó escalamiento (tareaId nulo/no existe/no pendiente o no vencida)')     FROM dbo.WF_Queue q     JOIN @msgs m ON m.Id = q.Id     WHERE q.LastError IS NULL       AND NOT EXISTS (           SELECT 1           FROM @msgs m2           WHERE m2.Id = q.Id             AND m2.Payload IS NOT NULL AND ISJSON(m2.Payload) = 1             AND TRY_CONVERT(bigint, JSON_VALUE(m2.Payload, '$.tareaId')) IS NOT NULL       ); END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Gerente_EnCurso_MiAlcance]     @UserKey nvarchar(200) AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      DECLARE @UserKeyFull nvarchar(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@UserKey,'')));      -- Requiere permiso de gerencia (modelo nuevo)     IF dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_GERENCIA', NULL, NULL) = 0     BEGIN         SELECT TOP 0 * FROM dbo.WF_Instancia;         RETURN;     END      -- En curso (mi alcance): respeta scope/proceso configurado     SELECT TOP 200         i.Id,         i.ProcesoKey,         i.EmpresaKey,         i.ScopeKey,         i.Estado,         i.FechaInicio,         i.CreadoPor     FROM dbo.WF_Instancia i     WHERE i.Estado = 'EnCurso'       AND dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_GERENCIA', i.ProcesoKey, i.ScopeKey) = 1     ORDER BY i.FechaInicio DESC;  END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Gerente_Historial]     @UserKey nvarchar(200) AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      DECLARE @UserKeyFull nvarchar(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@UserKey,'')));      -- Validación correcta (modelo nuevo)     IF dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_GERENCIA', NULL, NULL) = 0     BEGIN         SELECT TOP 0 * FROM dbo.WF_Instancia;         RETURN;     END      -- Historial (gerencia ve según scope/proceso configurado)     SELECT TOP 200         i.Id,         i.ProcesoKey,         i.EmpresaKey,         i.ScopeKey,         i.Estado,         i.FechaInicio,         i.FechaFin,         i.CreadoPor     FROM dbo.WF_Instancia i     WHERE i.Estado IN ('Finalizado','Error')       AND dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_GERENCIA', i.ProcesoKey, i.ScopeKey) = 1     ORDER BY ISNULL(i.FechaFin, i.FechaInicio) DESC;  END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Gerente_Tareas_Cerradas_Mis]     @UserKey nvarchar(200) AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      DECLARE @UserKeyFull nvarchar(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@UserKey,'')));      -- Solo controla acceso gerencial     IF dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_GERENCIA', NULL, NULL) = 0     BEGIN         SELECT TOP 0 * FROM dbo.WF_Tarea;         RETURN;     END;      ;WITH UltimaCerrada AS     (         SELECT             t.Id,             t.WF_InstanciaId,             t.Titulo,             t.Descripcion,             t.RolDestino,             t.AsignadoA,             t.UsuarioAsignado,             COALESCE(NULLIF(t.AsignadoA,''), NULLIF(t.UsuarioAsignado,''), t.RolDestino) AS ResponsableActual,             t.ScopeKey,             t.Estado      AS TareaEstado,             t.Resultado   AS TareaResultado,             t.FechaCreacion,             t.FechaVencimiento,             t.FechaCierre,             ROW_NUMBER() OVER             (                 PARTITION BY t.WF_InstanciaId                 ORDER BY t.FechaCierre DESC, t.Id DESC             ) AS rn         FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t         INNER JOIN dbo.WF_Instancia i             ON i.Id = t.WF_InstanciaId         WHERE t.Estado = 'Completada'           AND i.Estado = 'Finalizado'     )     SELECT TOP 200         u.Id,         u.WF_InstanciaId,         u.Titulo,         u.Descripcion,         u.RolDestino,         u.AsignadoA,         u.UsuarioAsignado,         u.ResponsableActual,         u.ScopeKey,         u.TareaEstado,         u.TareaResultado,         u.FechaCreacion,         u.FechaVencimiento,         u.FechaCierre     FROM UltimaCerrada u     WHERE u.rn = 1     ORDER BY u.FechaCierre DESC, u.FechaCreacion DESC; END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Gerente_Tareas_MisTareas]     @UserKey nvarchar(200) AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      DECLARE @UserKeyFull  nvarchar(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@UserKey,'')));     DECLARE @UserKeyShort nvarchar(200) = dbo.WF_UserKeyShort(@UserKeyFull);      -- Requiere permiso de gerencia (o admin)     IF dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_GERENCIA', NULL, NULL) = 0     BEGIN         SELECT TOP 0 * FROM dbo.WF_Tarea;         RETURN;     END      SELECT TOP 200         t.Id,         t.WF_InstanciaId,         t.Titulo,         t.Descripcion,         t.RolDestino,         t.AsignadoA,         t.UsuarioAsignado,         t.ScopeKey,         t.Estado AS TareaEstado,         t.FechaCreacion,         t.FechaVencimiento,         t.FechaCierre AS FechaCierre,         t.Datos     FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t     JOIN dbo.WF_Instancia i ON i.Id = t.WF_InstanciaId     WHERE t.Estado = 'Pendiente'       AND (             -- Asignación directa (si la tarea fue "tomada" o asignada)             t.AsignadoA IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort)          OR t.UsuarioAsignado IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort)              -- Por mi rol (pero VALIDADO por alcance Proceso/Scope)          OR (                 EXISTS (                     SELECT 1                     FROM dbo.WF_UsuarioRol ur                     WHERE ur.Activo = 1                       AND ur.Usuario IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort)                       AND ur.RolKey = t.RolDestino                 )                 AND dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_GERENCIA', i.ProcesoKey, t.ScopeKey) = 1             )       )     ORDER BY t.FechaVencimiento ASC, t.FechaCreacion DESC; END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Gerente_Tareas_Pendientes_MiAlcance]     @UserKey nvarchar(200) AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      DECLARE @UserKeyFull nvarchar(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@UserKey,'')));      -- Requiere permiso de gerencia (modelo nuevo)     IF dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_GERENCIA', NULL, NULL) = 0     BEGIN         SELECT TOP 0 * FROM dbo.WF_Tarea;         RETURN;     END      SELECT TOP 200         t.Id,         t.WF_InstanciaId,         i.ProcesoKey,         i.EmpresaKey,         t.ScopeKey,         t.Titulo,         t.RolDestino,         t.AsignadoA,         t.UsuarioAsignado,         t.Estado AS TareaEstado,         t.FechaCreacion,         t.FechaVencimiento,         t.FechaCierre AS FechaCierre,         t.Datos     FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t     JOIN dbo.WF_Instancia i ON i.Id = t.WF_InstanciaId     WHERE t.Estado = 'Pendiente'       AND dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(             @UserKeyFull,             'TAREAS_GERENCIA',             i.ProcesoKey,             ISNULL(NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(t.ScopeKey)), ''), i.ScopeKey)           ) = 1     ORDER BY t.FechaVencimiento ASC, t.FechaCreacion DESC;  END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Gerente_Tareas_PorMiRol]     @UserKey nvarchar(200) AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      DECLARE @UserKeyFull  nvarchar(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@UserKey,'')));     DECLARE @UserKeyShort nvarchar(200) = dbo.WF_UserKeyShort(@UserKeyFull);      -- Requiere permiso de gerencia (modelo nuevo)     IF dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_GERENCIA', NULL, NULL) = 0     BEGIN         SELECT TOP 0 * FROM dbo.WF_Tarea;         RETURN;     END      SELECT TOP 200         t.Id,         t.WF_InstanciaId,         t.Titulo,         t.Descripcion,         t.RolDestino,         t.AsignadoA,         t.UsuarioAsignado,         t.ScopeKey,         t.Estado AS TareaEstado,         t.FechaCreacion,         t.FechaVencimiento,         t.FechaCierre AS FechaCierre,         t.Datos     FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t     JOIN dbo.WF_Instancia i ON i.Id = t.WF_InstanciaId     WHERE t.Estado = 'Pendiente'       -- pool por rol (no asignada a un usuario puntual)       AND (t.AsignadoA IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(t.AsignadoA)) = '')       -- el usuario tiene ese rol       AND EXISTS (           SELECT 1           FROM dbo.WF_UsuarioRol ur           WHERE ur.Activo = 1             AND ur.Usuario IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort)             AND ur.RolKey = t.RolDestino       )       -- dentro de su alcance (proceso/scope) según RBAC       AND dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(             @UserKeyFull,             'TAREAS_GERENCIA',             i.ProcesoKey,             ISNULL(NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(t.ScopeKey)), ''), i.ScopeKey)           ) = 1     ORDER BY t.FechaVencimiento ASC, t.FechaCreacion DESC;  END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Instancia_ActualizarBandejas]     @InstanciaId bigint AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      DECLARE @DefId int;     DECLARE @ProcesoKey nvarchar(50);     DECLARE @Empresa nvarchar(200);     DECLARE @DatosContexto nvarchar(max);      SELECT         @DefId = i.WF_DefinicionId,         @DatosContexto = i.DatosContexto     FROM dbo.WF_Instancia i     WHERE i.Id = @InstanciaId;      -- Instancia inexistente     IF @DefId IS NULL         RETURN;      -- ProcesoKey = WF_Definicion.Codigo (genérico)     SELECT         @ProcesoKey = d.Codigo     FROM dbo.WF_Definicion d     WHERE d.Id = @DefId;      -- Empresa desde JSON (solo si es JSON válido)     IF ISJSON(@DatosContexto) = 1     BEGIN         SET @Empresa = JSON_VALUE(@DatosContexto, '$.estado.input.empresa');         IF (@Empresa IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@Empresa)) = '')             SET @Empresa = JSON_VALUE(@DatosContexto, '$.estado.input.empresaKey');         IF (@Empresa IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@Empresa)) = '')             SET @Empresa = JSON_VALUE(@DatosContexto, '$.estado.biz.empresa');     END      -- Resolver ScopeKey por reglas     DECLARE @ScopeKey nvarchar(50) = NULL;      IF ISJSON(@DatosContexto) = 1     BEGIN         SELECT TOP 1             @ScopeKey = r.ScopeKey         FROM dbo.WF_ScopeRegla r         WHERE (r.WF_DefinicionId IS NULL OR r.WF_DefinicionId = @DefId)           AND (                 (r.MatchTipo = 'equals'   AND JSON_VALUE(@DatosContexto, r.CampoJson) = r.MatchValor)              OR (r.MatchTipo = 'contains' AND JSON_VALUE(@DatosContexto, r.CampoJson) LIKE '%' + r.MatchValor + '%')           )         ORDER BY r.Id DESC;     END      IF (@ScopeKey IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@ScopeKey)) = '')         SET @ScopeKey = 'GLOBAL';      UPDATE dbo.WF_Instancia     SET ProcesoKey = @ProcesoKey,         EmpresaKey = @Empresa,         ScopeKey   = @ScopeKey     WHERE Id = @InstanciaId; END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Setting_Get]     @SettingKey nvarchar(200),     @ScopeKey   nvarchar(100) = NULL AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      DECLARE @Scope nvarchar(100) = NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(@ScopeKey)), '');     DECLARE @Key   nvarchar(200) = NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(@SettingKey)), '');      -- Si no hay key válida, devolver vacío     IF @Key IS NULL     BEGIN         SELECT CAST(NULL AS nvarchar(max)) AS Value;         RETURN;     END      -- 1) Si hay valor específico por ScopeKey, gana     IF @Scope IS NOT NULL     BEGIN         SELECT TOP 1             Value         FROM dbo.WF_Setting         WHERE Activo = 1           AND SettingKey = @Key           AND ScopeKey = @Scope         ORDER BY UpdatedAt DESC;          IF @@ROWCOUNT > 0 RETURN;     END      -- 2) Fallback global (ScopeKey NULL)     SELECT TOP 1         Value     FROM dbo.WF_Setting     WHERE Activo = 1       AND SettingKey = @Key       AND ScopeKey IS NULL     ORDER BY UpdatedAt DESC; END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Tarea_Escalar_CrearNueva]     @TareaIdOriginal  bigint,     @NuevoRolDestino  nvarchar(200),     @Motivo           nvarchar(200) = NULL,     @Usuario          nvarchar(200) = NULL AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;     SET XACT_ABORT ON;      DECLARE @Ahora datetime = GETDATE();      BEGIN TRAN;      DECLARE         @WF_InstanciaId bigint,         @NodoId nvarchar(100),         @NodoTipo nvarchar(200),         @Titulo nvarchar(400),         @Descripcion nvarchar(max),         @ScopeKey nvarchar(200),         @FechaVencimiento datetime,         @Datos nvarchar(max),         @RolDestinoOriginal nvarchar(200);      -- Tomo la tarea y la bloqueo; exijo Pendiente acá (una sola validación)     SELECT         @WF_InstanciaId = t.WF_InstanciaId,         @NodoId = t.NodoId,         @NodoTipo = t.NodoTipo,         @Titulo = t.Titulo,         @Descripcion = t.Descripcion,         @ScopeKey = t.ScopeKey,         @FechaVencimiento = t.FechaVencimiento,         @Datos = t.Datos,         @RolDestinoOriginal = t.RolDestino     FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t WITH (UPDLOCK, ROWLOCK)     WHERE t.Id = @TareaIdOriginal       AND t.Estado = 'Pendiente';      IF @WF_InstanciaId IS NULL     BEGIN         ROLLBACK;         RAISERROR('Tarea no encontrada o ya no está Pendiente: %d', 16, 1, @TareaIdOriginal);         RETURN;     END      IF NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@NodoId,''))), '') IS NULL        OR NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@NodoTipo,''))), '') IS NULL     BEGIN         ROLLBACK;         RAISERROR('La tarea original no tiene NodoId/NodoTipo válidos.', 16, 1);         RETURN;     END      DECLARE @JsonBase nvarchar(max) =         CASE WHEN ISJSON(@Datos) = 1 THEN @Datos ELSE N'{}' END;      -- 1) Cerrar original     UPDATE dbo.WF_Tarea        SET Estado = 'Completada',            Resultado = 'Escalada',            FechaCierre = @Ahora,            Datos = JSON_MODIFY(                     JSON_MODIFY(                       JSON_MODIFY(                         JSON_MODIFY(                           JSON_MODIFY(                             JSON_MODIFY(@JsonBase, '$.escalado', 'true'),                             '$.escaladoEn', CONVERT(varchar(33), @Ahora, 126)                           ),                           '$.escaladoMotivo', ISNULL(@Motivo,'SLA vencido')                         ),                         '$.escaladoPor', ISNULL(@Usuario,'system')                       ),                       '$.escaladoRolOriginal', ISNULL(@RolDestinoOriginal,'')                     ),                     '$.escaladoRolNuevo', ISNULL(@NuevoRolDestino,'')                   )      WHERE Id = @TareaIdOriginal;      -- 2) JSON nueva tarea (base = json original “limpio”)     DECLARE @JsonNueva nvarchar(max) = @JsonBase;      -- limpiar flags del original     SET @JsonNueva = JSON_MODIFY(@JsonNueva, '$.escalado', NULL);     SET @JsonNueva = JSON_MODIFY(@JsonNueva, '$.escaladoEn', NULL);     SET @JsonNueva = JSON_MODIFY(@JsonNueva, '$.escaladoMotivo', NULL);     SET @JsonNueva = JSON_MODIFY(@JsonNueva, '$.escaladoPor', NULL);     SET @JsonNueva = JSON_MODIFY(@JsonNueva, '$.escaladoRolOriginal', NULL);     SET @JsonNueva = JSON_MODIFY(@JsonNueva, '$.escaladoRolNuevo', NULL);      -- NO heredar “encolado” del original     SET @JsonNueva = JSON_MODIFY(@JsonNueva, '$.escalamientoEncolado', NULL);     SET @JsonNueva = JSON_MODIFY(@JsonNueva, '$.escalamientoEncoladoEn', NULL);     SET @JsonNueva = JSON_MODIFY(@JsonNueva, '$.escalamientoEncoladoMotivo', NULL);      -- ✅ ORIGEN como objeto completo     DECLARE @OrigenObj nvarchar(max) =         N'{' +         N'"tareaId":"' + CONVERT(nvarchar(50), @TareaIdOriginal) + N'",' +         N'"motivo":"' + STRING_ESCAPE(ISNULL(@Motivo,'SLA vencido'), 'json') + N'",' +         N'"rolOriginal":"' + STRING_ESCAPE(ISNULL(@RolDestinoOriginal,''), 'json') + N'",' +         N'"rolNuevo":"' + STRING_ESCAPE(ISNULL(@NuevoRolDestino,''), 'json') + N'",' +         N'"creadaEn":"' + CONVERT(nvarchar(33), @Ahora, 126) + N'",' +         N'"creadaPor":"' + STRING_ESCAPE(ISNULL(@Usuario,'system'), 'json') + N'"' +         N'}';      SET @JsonNueva = JSON_MODIFY(@JsonNueva, '$.origenEscalamiento', JSON_QUERY(@OrigenObj));      IF ISJSON(@JsonNueva) <> 1     BEGIN         ROLLBACK;         RAISERROR('JsonNueva inválido luego de construir origenEscalamiento.', 16, 1);         RETURN;     END      -- 3) Crear nueva tarea     DECLARE @NuevaTareaId bigint;      INSERT INTO dbo.WF_Tarea         (WF_InstanciaId, NodoId, NodoTipo, Titulo, Descripcion,          RolDestino, UsuarioAsignado, Estado, Resultado,          FechaCreacion, FechaVencimiento, FechaCierre, Datos, ScopeKey, AsignadoA,          OrigenTareaId)     VALUES         (@WF_InstanciaId, @NodoId, @NodoTipo, @Titulo, @Descripcion,          @NuevoRolDestino, NULL, 'Pendiente', NULL,          @Ahora, @FechaVencimiento, NULL,          -- ✅ NO perder vencimiento          @JsonNueva,          @ScopeKey, NULL,          @TareaIdOriginal);      SET @NuevaTareaId = CAST(SCOPE_IDENTITY() AS bigint);      COMMIT;      SELECT         @TareaIdOriginal AS TareaOriginalId,         @NuevaTareaId    AS TareaNuevaId,         @RolDestinoOriginal AS RolOriginal,         @NuevoRolDestino AS RolNuevo; END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Tarea_Escalar_Pendientes] AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;     SET XACT_ABORT ON;      DECLARE @Ahora datetime = GETDATE();      BEGIN TRAN;      -- 1) Claim atómico de tareas “vencidas” que aún no fueron encoladas     DECLARE @Escalar TABLE (         Id bigint NOT NULL,         WF_InstanciaId bigint NULL,         Titulo nvarchar(400) NULL,         RolDestino nvarchar(200) NULL,         ScopeKey nvarchar(200) NULL,         FechaVencimiento datetime NULL     );      ;WITH cte AS (         SELECT TOP (50)             t.Id         FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t WITH (ROWLOCK, READPAST, UPDLOCK)         WHERE t.Estado = 'Pendiente'           AND t.FechaVencimiento IS NOT NULL           AND t.FechaVencimiento < @Ahora           AND (t.AsignadoA IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(t.AsignadoA)) = '')           AND ISNULL(JSON_VALUE(CASE WHEN ISJSON(t.Datos)=1 THEN t.Datos ELSE N'{}' END, '$.escalamientoEncolado'),'') <> 'true'         ORDER BY t.FechaVencimiento ASC, t.Id ASC     )     UPDATE t        SET Datos =             JSON_MODIFY(               JSON_MODIFY(                 JSON_MODIFY(                   CASE WHEN ISJSON(t.Datos)=1 THEN t.Datos ELSE N'{}' END,                   '$.escalamientoEncolado', 'true'                 ),                 '$.escalamientoEncoladoEn', CONVERT(varchar(33), @Ahora, 126)               ),               '$.escalamientoEncoladoMotivo', 'SLA vencido'             )     OUTPUT         inserted.Id,         inserted.WF_InstanciaId,         inserted.Titulo,         inserted.RolDestino,         inserted.ScopeKey,         inserted.FechaVencimiento     INTO @Escalar(Id, WF_InstanciaId, Titulo, RolDestino, ScopeKey, FechaVencimiento)     FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t     JOIN cte ON cte.Id = t.Id;      IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM @Escalar)     BEGIN         COMMIT;         RETURN;     END      -- 2) Encolar evento en WF_Queue (idempotencia por CorrelationId pendiente)     INSERT INTO dbo.WF_Queue         (Queue, CorrelationId, Payload, CreatedAt, DueAt, Priority, Processed, Attempts)     SELECT         'wf.escalamiento' AS Queue,         CAST(c.Id AS nvarchar(100)) AS CorrelationId,         CONCAT(             '{',               '"tipo":"SLA_ESCALADO",',               '"tareaId":', c.Id, ',',               '"instanciaId":', ISNULL(CONVERT(nvarchar(50), c.WF_InstanciaId),'null'), ',',               '"rolDestino":"', ISNULL(REPLACE(c.RolDestino,'"','\"'), ''), '",',               '"scopeKey":"', ISNULL(REPLACE(c.ScopeKey,'"','\"'), ''), '",',               '"titulo":"', ISNULL(REPLACE(REPLACE(c.Titulo,'"','\"'), CHAR(10),' '), ''), '",',               '"fechaVencimiento":"', ISNULL(CONVERT(varchar(33), c.FechaVencimiento, 126), ''), '",',               '"escaladoEn":"', CONVERT(varchar(33), @Ahora, 126), '"',             '}'         ) AS Payload,         @Ahora AS CreatedAt,         NULL AS DueAt,         10 AS Priority,         0 AS Processed,         0 AS Attempts     FROM @Escalar c     WHERE NOT EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM dbo.WF_Queue q WITH (UPDLOCK, HOLDLOCK, READPAST)         WHERE q.Queue = 'wf.escalamiento'           AND q.Processed = 0           AND q.CorrelationId = CAST(c.Id AS nvarchar(100))     );      COMMIT; END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Tarea_Get]     @TareaId bigint AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      SELECT         -- WF_Tarea         t.Id                 AS TareaId,         t.WF_InstanciaId     AS InstanciaId,         t.NodoId,         t.NodoTipo,         t.Titulo,         t.Descripcion,         t.RolDestino,         t.UsuarioAsignado,         t.AsignadoA,         t.OrigenTareaId,                 -- ✅ NUEVO         t.Estado             AS TareaEstado,         t.Resultado          AS TareaResultado,         t.FechaCreacion,         t.FechaVencimiento,         t.FechaCierre        AS TareaFechaCierre,         t.Datos              AS DatosTareaJson,         t.ScopeKey           AS TareaScopeKey,          -- WF_Instancia         i.WF_DefinicionId    AS DefinicionId,       -- ✅ NUEVO         i.Estado             AS InstanciaEstado,         i.FechaInicio,         i.FechaFin,         i.CreadoPor,         i.DatosEntrada       AS DatosEntradaJson,         i.DatosContexto      AS DatosContextoJson,         i.ProcesoKey,         i.ScopeKey           AS InstanciaScopeKey,         i.EmpresaKey,         i.DocTipoId,          -- WF_Definicion (Proceso)         d.Codigo             AS DefCodigo,         d.Nombre             AS DefNombre,         d.Version            AS DefVersion     FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t     JOIN dbo.WF_Instancia i   ON i.Id = t.WF_InstanciaId     JOIN dbo.WF_Definicion d  ON d.Id = i.WF_DefinicionId     WHERE t.Id = @TareaId; END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Tarea_Historial]     @TareaId bigint AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      IF @TareaId IS NULL OR @TareaId <= 0     BEGIN         SELECT CAST(0 AS int) AS ok, 'TareaId inválido' AS error;         RETURN;     END      DECLARE @InstanciaId bigint;      SELECT @InstanciaId = t.WF_InstanciaId     FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t     WHERE t.Id = @TareaId;      IF @InstanciaId IS NULL     BEGIN         SELECT CAST(0 AS int) AS ok, 'Tarea no encontrada' AS error;         RETURN;     END      ;WITH BackChain AS (         -- arrancamos desde la tarea indicada         SELECT             t.Id,             t.OrigenTareaId,             0 AS lvl,             CAST(CONCAT('|', CONVERT(varchar(20), t.Id), '|') AS varchar(max)) AS path         FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t         WHERE t.Id = @TareaId           AND t.WF_InstanciaId = @InstanciaId          UNION ALL          -- subimos hacia la raíz (misma instancia + evitar ciclos)         SELECT             t2.Id,             t2.OrigenTareaId,             bc.lvl + 1,             CAST(bc.path + CONVERT(varchar(20), t2.Id) + '|' AS varchar(max)) AS path         FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t2         INNER JOIN BackChain bc ON bc.OrigenTareaId = t2.Id         WHERE t2.WF_InstanciaId = @InstanciaId           AND bc.path NOT LIKE '%|' + CONVERT(varchar(20), t2.Id) + '|%'     ),     Root AS (         SELECT TOP (1) Id AS RootId         FROM BackChain         ORDER BY lvl DESC     ),     FwdChain AS (         -- desde raíz hacia adelante         SELECT             t.Id,             t.OrigenTareaId,             0 AS nivel,             CAST(CONCAT('|', CONVERT(varchar(20), t.Id), '|') AS varchar(max)) AS path         FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t         CROSS JOIN Root r         WHERE t.Id = r.RootId           AND t.WF_InstanciaId = @InstanciaId          UNION ALL          -- siguiente tarea (misma instancia + evitar ciclos)         SELECT             t2.Id,             t2.OrigenTareaId,             fc.nivel + 1,             CAST(fc.path + CONVERT(varchar(20), t2.Id) + '|' AS varchar(max)) AS path         FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t2         INNER JOIN FwdChain fc ON t2.OrigenTareaId = fc.Id         WHERE t2.WF_InstanciaId = @InstanciaId           AND fc.path NOT LIKE '%|' + CONVERT(varchar(20), t2.Id) + '|%'     )     SELECT         1 AS ok,         t.Id,         t.WF_InstanciaId,         t.NodoId,         t.NodoTipo,         t.Titulo,         t.RolDestino,         t.Estado,         t.Resultado,         t.FechaCreacion,         t.FechaVencimiento,         t.FechaCierre,         t.AsignadoA,         t.ScopeKey,         t.OrigenTareaId,         fc.nivel AS Nivel,         CASE WHEN ISJSON(t.Datos) = 1 THEN JSON_QUERY(t.Datos, '$.origenEscalamiento') END AS OrigenEscalamientoObj,         t.Datos     FROM FwdChain fc     JOIN dbo.WF_Tarea t ON t.Id = fc.Id     ORDER BY fc.nivel ASC     OPTION (MAXRECURSION 100); END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Tarea_Liberar]     @TareaId bigint,     @UserKey nvarchar(200) AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      DECLARE @UserKeyFull  nvarchar(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@UserKey, '')));     DECLARE @UserKeyShort nvarchar(200) = dbo.WF_UserKeyShort(@UserKeyFull);      -- Permiso mínimo: tareas propias o admin     IF dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_MIS', NULL, NULL) = 0        AND dbo.WF_IsAdmin(@UserKeyFull) = 0     BEGIN         RAISERROR('Sin permiso para liberar tareas.', 16, 1);         RETURN;     END      -- Solo el asignado (o admin) puede liberar.     -- Liberar = soltar el lock (AsignadoA). No borrar UsuarioAsignado salvo que sea el mismo lock.     UPDATE dbo.WF_Tarea     SET         AsignadoA = NULL,         UsuarioAsignado = CASE             WHEN UsuarioAsignado IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort) THEN NULL             ELSE UsuarioAsignado         END     WHERE Id = @TareaId       AND Estado = 'Pendiente'       AND (             dbo.WF_IsAdmin(@UserKeyFull) = 1          OR AsignadoA IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort)          OR UsuarioAsignado IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort)       );      IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0         RAISERROR('No se pudo liberar la tarea (no sos el asignado o no está pendiente).', 16, 1); END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Tarea_PuedeAbrir]     @TareaId bigint,     @UserKey nvarchar(200) AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      DECLARE @UserKeyFull  nvarchar(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@UserKey,'')));     DECLARE @UserKeyShort nvarchar(200) = dbo.WF_UserKeyShort(@UserKeyFull);      -- Admin global     IF dbo.WF_IsAdmin(@UserKeyFull) = 1     BEGIN         SELECT CAST(1 AS bit);         RETURN;     END      DECLARE @InstanciaId bigint, @ScopeKey nvarchar(50), @ProcesoKey nvarchar(50), @RolDestino nvarchar(200);      SELECT         @InstanciaId = t.WF_InstanciaId,         @ScopeKey    = t.ScopeKey,         @RolDestino  = t.RolDestino     FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t     WHERE t.Id = @TareaId;      IF @InstanciaId IS NULL     BEGIN         SELECT CAST(0 AS bit);         RETURN;     END      SELECT @ProcesoKey = i.ProcesoKey     FROM dbo.WF_Instancia i     WHERE i.Id = @InstanciaId;      -- 1) asignación directa     IF EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t         WHERE t.Id = @TareaId           AND (                 t.AsignadoA IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort)              OR t.UsuarioAsignado IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort)           )     )     BEGIN         SELECT CAST(1 AS bit);         RETURN;     END      -- 2) gerencia por alcance     IF dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_GERENCIA', @ProcesoKey, @ScopeKey) = 1        AND EXISTS (             SELECT 1             FROM dbo.WF_UsuarioRol ur             WHERE ur.Activo = 1               AND ur.Usuario IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort)               AND ur.RolKey = @RolDestino        )     BEGIN         SELECT CAST(1 AS bit);         RETURN;     END      -- 3) operador por rol (mis tareas)     IF dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_MIS', @ProcesoKey, @ScopeKey) = 1        AND EXISTS (             SELECT 1             FROM dbo.WF_UsuarioRol ur             WHERE ur.Activo = 1               AND ur.Usuario IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort)               AND ur.RolKey = @RolDestino        )     BEGIN         SELECT CAST(1 AS bit);         RETURN;     END  	-- 4) alcance puro (lo que ve en "Mi alcance") 	IF dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_GERENCIA', @ProcesoKey, @ScopeKey) = 1 		BEGIN 			SELECT CAST(1 AS bit); 			RETURN; 		END      SELECT CAST(0 AS bit); END

type=SQL_STORED_PROCEDURE  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WF_Tarea_Tomar]     @TareaId   bigint,     @UserKey   nvarchar(200) AS BEGIN     SET NOCOUNT ON;      DECLARE @UserKeyFull  nvarchar(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(@UserKey, '')));     DECLARE @UserKeyShort nvarchar(200) = dbo.WF_UserKeyShort(@UserKeyFull);      -- Validación mínima (tareas propias o admin)     IF dbo.WF_UserHasPermiso(@UserKeyFull, 'TAREAS_MIS', NULL, NULL) = 0        AND dbo.WF_IsAdmin(@UserKeyFull) = 0     BEGIN         RAISERROR('Sin permiso para tomar tareas.', 16, 1);         RETURN;     END      ;WITH T AS (         SELECT TOP 1             t.Id,             t.RolDestino,             t.UsuarioAsignado,             t.AsignadoA,             t.Estado         FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t         WHERE t.Id = @TareaId     )     UPDATE t     SET         -- lock/reserva         AsignadoA = @UserKeyFull,         -- NO pisar UsuarioAsignado si ya había target; solo setearlo si estaba vacío         UsuarioAsignado = CASE             WHEN (t.UsuarioAsignado IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(t.UsuarioAsignado)) = '')                 THEN @UserKeyShort             ELSE t.UsuarioAsignado         END     FROM dbo.WF_Tarea t     JOIN T x ON x.Id = t.Id     WHERE t.Id = @TareaId       AND t.Estado = 'Pendiente'       AND (t.AsignadoA IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(t.AsignadoA)) = '')       AND (             dbo.WF_IsAdmin(@UserKeyFull) = 1              -- tarea dirigida a usuario (target)          OR t.UsuarioAsignado IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort)              -- tarea por rol (pool): el usuario tiene ese rol activo          OR EXISTS (                 SELECT 1                 FROM dbo.WF_UsuarioRol ur                 WHERE ur.Activo = 1                   AND ur.Usuario IN (@UserKeyFull, @UserKeyShort)                   AND ur.RolKey = t.RolDestino             )       );      IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0     BEGIN         RAISERROR('La tarea ya fue tomada, no está disponible o no estás autorizado para tomarla.', 16, 1);         RETURN;     END END
